ToolSync Suite v2.3 Script
The core script (toolsync.sh) is enhanced to support dynamic directory detection, real-time monitoring, and robust recovery, replacing v2.2 with improved performance and security.
bash
#!/bin/bash
# TOOLSYNC SUITE v2.3
# Automates path alignment, environment synchronization, and deployment for Quran Platform v4.3
# Date: June 23, 2025, 13:44 BST
# Compatible: Windows (MINGW64), Linux, macOS
# Repository: Dynamically detected
# Authors: Rehan, Grok, Jules

set -euo pipefail
trap 'handle_error $? $LINENO' ERR

# ===== CONFIGURATION =====
REPO_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || realpath .)
LOG_DIR=$(find "$REPO_ROOT" -type d -name "logs" | head -1 || echo "$REPO_ROOT/collaboration/logs")
METRICS_DIR=$(find "$REPO_ROOT" -type d -name "metrics" | head -1 || echo "$REPO_ROOT/monitoring/metrics")
BACKUP_DIR=$(find "$REPO_ROOT" -type d -name "backups" | head -1 || echo "$REPO_ROOT/.backups")
K8S_CONFIG_DIR=$(find "$REPO_ROOT" -type d -name "infra" | head -1 || echo "$REPO_ROOT/infra")
ASSET_DIR=$(find "$REPO_ROOT" -type d -name "assets" | head -1 || echo "$REPO_ROOT/assets")
DOCS_DIR=$(find "$REPO_ROOT" -type d -name "docs" | head -1 || echo "$REPO_ROOT/docs")
STATE_DIR=$(find "$REPO_ROOT" -type d -name "state" | head -1 || echo "$REPO_ROOT/collaboration/state")
MONITOR_DIR=$(find "$REPO_ROOT" -type d -name "monitoring" | head -1 || echo "$REPO_ROOT/monitoring")
CACHE_DB="${REPO_ROOT}/.path_cache.sqlite"
PERF_STATS="${METRICS_DIR}/performance.json"
LOCK_FILE="${REPO_ROOT}/.toolsync.lock"
CONFIG_FILE="${REPO_ROOT}/.toolsync_config.yaml"
PATH_MAPPING="${REPO_ROOT}/PATH_MAPPING.md"
AUDIT_LOG="${LOG_DIR}/security_audit.json"
QUARANTINE_DIR="${REPO_ROOT}/.quarantine"
BACKUP_STORAGE="s3://toolsync-backups"
VAULT_ADDR="${VAULT_ADDR:-http://vault:8200}"
KMS_KEY_ID="${KMS_KEY_ID:-alias/toolsync-key}"
ERROR_LOG="${LOG_DIR}/errors.json"
CHANGELOG="${DOCS_DIR}/changelog.md"
VERSIONS_JSON="${DOCS_DIR}/versions.json"
EXPERIENCE_DB="${LOG_DIR}/experience.json"
LAST_RUN_FILE="${REPO_ROOT}/.last_run"
HEARTBEAT="${MONITOR_DIR}/heartbeat"
CURRENT_STATE="${STATE_DIR}/system_state.json"
LAST_UPDATE="${STATE_DIR}/last_update"
ENV_PATH="${REPO_ROOT}/.env"
GITHUB_URL="https://github.com/Rehan719/quran-recitation-platform"
BRANCH_NAME="toolsync-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)"
SLACK_WEBHOOK="${SLACK_WEBHOOK:-}"
MAX_RETRIES=3
RETRY_DELAY=60
PLATFORM=$(uname -s | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]')
case "$PLATFORM" in
    msys*|cygwin*|mingw*) PLATFORM="windows" ;;
    linux*) PLATFORM="linux" ;;
    darwin*) PLATFORM="macos" ;;
    *) echo "Unknown platform"; exit 1 ;;
esac

# Resource thresholds
MIN_DISK_SPACE_MB=5000
MIN_MEMORY_MB=16000
MAX_ASSET_SIZE_MB=100

# Flags
DRY_RUN=false
INCREMENTAL=false
VERBOSE=false
DEBUG=false
AUTO_PR=false
CHECK_GIT=true
CLEAN=false
PREFER_OFFLINE=false
ENVIRONMENT="development"
FORCE=false

# Memory cache
declare -A PATH_CACHE
CACHE_HITS=0
CACHE_MISSES=0
declare -a CHANGED_FILES
declare -a SUCCESSFUL_STEPS
declare -a FAILED_STEPS

# ===== UTILITY FUNCTIONS =====
log_info() { echo "[$(date +'%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] INFO: $1" | tee -a "${LOG_DIR}/toolsync.log"; }
log_warning() { echo "[$(date +'%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] WARN: $1" | tee -a "${LOG_DIR}/toolsync.log"; }
log_error() {
    local code="$1" msg="$2"
    echo "[$(date +'%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] ERROR [$code]: $msg" | tee -a "${LOG_DIR}/toolsync.log"
    jq --arg code "$code" --arg msg "$msg" --arg ts "$(date +'%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')" \
       '. += [{"code":$code, "message":$msg, "timestamp":$ts, "remediation":"See ${DOCS_DIR}/TROUBLESHOOTING.md"}]' \
       "$ERROR_LOG" > tmp.json && mv tmp.json "$ERROR_LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo "Failed to log error" >&2
    update_experience "$code" "$msg" "See ${LOG_DIR}/toolsync.log" "Check ${DOCS_DIR}/TROUBLESHOOTING.md"
    notify "ERROR [$code]: $msg"
    exit 1
}

notify() {
    local message="$1"
    log_info "$message"
    if [[ -n "$SLACK_WEBHOOK" ]]; then
        curl -s -X POST -H 'Content-type: application/json' --data "{\"text\":\"$message\"}" "$SLACK_WEBHOOK" || log_warning "Slack alert failed"
    fi
    if command -v gcloud &>/dev/null; then
        gcloud logging write toolsync-alerts "$message" --severity=ERROR
    fi
}

check_command() { command -v "$1" >/dev/null 2>&1; }
run_cmd() { "$@"; }
version_ge() { test "$(printf '%s\n' "$@" | sort -V | head -n 1)" = "$1"; }
get_disk_free_mb() {
    local dir="$1"
    case "$PLATFORM" in
        linux|windows) df -m "$dir" | tail -1 | awk '{print $4}' 2>/dev/null ;;
        macos) df -g "$dir" | tail -1 | awk '{print $4*1024}' 2>/dev/null ;;
        *) echo 0 ;;
    esac
}

get_memory_free_mb() {
    case "$PLATFORM" in
        linux) free -m | awk '/Mem:/{print $7}' 2>/dev/null ;;
        macos) top -l 1 | grep PhysMem | awk '{print $6}' | tr -d 'M' 2>/dev/null ;;
        windows) systeminfo | grep "Available Physical Memory" | awk '{print $4}' 2>/dev/null ;;
        *) echo 0 ;;
    esac
}

save_state() {
    jq -n --arg ts "$(date -Is)" --arg state "$1" --arg details "$2" \
       '{"timestamp":$ts, "state":$state, "details":$details}' > "$CURRENT_STATE"
    date +%s > "$LAST_UPDATE"
    touch "$HEARTBEAT"
    CHANGED_FILES+=("$CURRENT_STATE" "$LAST_UPDATE" "$HEARTBEAT")
}

# ===== DYNAMIC DIRECTORY DETECTION =====
detect_directories() {
    log_info "Detecting directory structure..."
    mkdir -p "$LOG_DIR" "$METRICS_DIR" "$BACKUP_DIR" "$K8S_CONFIG_DIR" "$ASSET_DIR" "$DOCS_DIR" "$STATE_DIR" "$MONITOR_DIR" "$QUARANTINE_DIR"
    PROJECT_DIRS=($(find "$REPO_ROOT" -type d \( -name "src" -o -name "frontend" -o -name "backend" -o -name "shared" \) -not -path "*/node_modules/*"))
    COMPOSE_FILES=($(find "$K8S_CONFIG_DIR" -type f -name "docker-compose*.yml" 2>/dev/null))
    log_info "Detected project directories: ${PROJECT_DIRS[*]}"
    log_info "Detected compose files: ${COMPOSE_FILES[*]}"
    jq -n --argjson dirs "$(printf '%s\n' "${PROJECT_DIRS[@]}" | jq -R . | jq -s .)" \
          --argjson compose "$(printf '%s\n' "${COMPOSE_FILES[@]}" | jq -R . | jq -s .)" \
          --arg ts "$(date +'%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')" \
          '{"timestamp":$ts, "project_dirs":$dirs, "compose_files":$compose}' > "${METRICS_DIR}/structure.json"
    CHANGED_FILES+=("${METRICS_DIR}/structure.json")
}

# ===== SECURITY MODULES =====
init_security() {
    log_info "Initializing security modules..."
    if check_command vault; then
        export ENCRYPTION_KEY=$(vault kv get -field=key secret/toolsync-key 2>/dev/null)
        log_security_event "VAULT_INIT" "Retrieved encryption key from Vault"
    elif check_command aws; then
        export ENCRYPTION_KEY=$(aws kms generate-data-key --key-id "$KMS_KEY_ID" --key-spec AES_256 --query Plaintext --output text | base64 -d | base64)
        aws kms create-key --description "ToolSync key rotation" --tags TagKey=Purpose,TagValue=ToolSync >/dev/null 2>&1
        log_security_event "KMS_INIT" "Generated encryption key from AWS KMS with rotation"
    else
        log_warning "No Vault or KMS available - using local encryption key"
        export ENCRYPTION_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 32)
        log_security_event "LOCAL_KEY_WARNING" "Using local encryption key"
    fi

    # JWT for AI endpoints
    if [[ -n "${JWT_SECRET:-}" ]]; then
        export JWT_TOKEN=$(jwt encode --secret "$JWT_SECRET" "{\"user\":\"toolsync\"}" 2>/dev/null)
        log_security_event "JWT_INIT" "Generated JWT for AI endpoints"
    fi

    # Script integrity check
    local SCRIPT_HASH=$(sha256sum "$0" | awk '{print $1}')
    local EXPECTED_HASH=$(cat "${REPO_ROOT}/.toolsync_hash" 2>/dev/null || echo "")
    if [[ -n "$EXPECTED_HASH" && "$SCRIPT_HASH" != "$EXPECTED_HASH" ]]; then
        log_error "QRP-ERR-025" "Script modification detected"
    fi
    log_security_event "INTEGRITY_PASS" "Script SHA-256 verified"
}

authenticate_user() {
    local user=$1
    if [[ -n "${VAULT_TOKEN:-}" ]]; then
        vault login -method=userpass username="$user" password="$(read -srp 'Vault Password: ' && echo "$REPLY")" >/dev/null
        log_security_event "AUTH_SUCCESS" "User $user authenticated via Vault"
    elif [[ -n "${GITHUB_TOKEN:-}" ]]; then
        echo "https://$user:$GITHUB_TOKEN@github.com" > ~/.git-credentials
        chmod 600 ~/.git-credentials
        log_security_event "GITHUB_AUTH_SUCCESS" "User $user authenticated via GitHub PAT"
    elif check_command keyring; then
        local token=$(python3 -c "import keyring; print(keyring.get_password('toolsync', '$user'))" 2>/dev/null)
        if [[ -n "$token" ]]; then
            echo "https://$user:$token@github.com" > ~/.git-credentials
            chmod 600 ~/.git-credentials
            log_security_event "KEYRING_AUTH_SUCCESS" "User $user authenticated via keyring"
        else
            read -sp "Enter GitHub PAT: " token
            echo
            python3 -c "import keyring; keyring.set_password('toolsync', '$user', '$token')"
            echo "https://$user:$token@github.com" > ~/.git-credentials
            chmod 600 ~/.git-credentials
            log_security_event "KEYRING_AUTH_NEW" "Stored new PAT for $user"
        fi
    else
        log_error "QRP-ERR-026" "Authentication not configured"
    fi
}

encrypt_data() {
    local data="$1"
    echo "$data" | openssl enc -aes-256-gcm -pbkdf2 -iter 100000 -a -pass pass:"$ENCRYPTION_KEY"
}

decrypt_data() {
    local data="$1"
    echo "$data" | openssl enc -d -aes-256-gcm -pbkdf2 -iter 100000 -a -pass pass:"$ENCRYPTION_KEY"
}

sql_sanitize() {
    local input="$1"
    echo "$input" | sed -e "s/'/''/g" -e "s/[;\"]//g"
}

sanitize_path() {
    local path="$1"
    path="${path#/}"
    path="${path//[^a-zA-Z0-9_~@./-]}"
    echo "$path"
}

log_security_event() {
    local event=$1 details=$2
    jq -n --arg ts "$(date +%s)" --arg user "$(whoami)" --arg event "$event" --arg details "$details" \
        '{timestamp: ($ts | tonumber), user: $user, event: $event, details: $details}' \
        >> "$AUDIT_LOG"
    CHANGED_FILES+=("$AUDIT_LOG")
}

# ===== INITIALIZATION =====
init_directories() {
    log_info "Initializing directories..."
    detect_directories
    if [[ -f "$LOCK_FILE" ]]; then
        log_error "QRP-ERR-027" "ToolSync process already running"
    fi
    touch "$LOCK_FILE"
    echo "$$" > "$LOCK_FILE"
    init_json_file "$ERROR_LOG"
    init_json_file "$EXPERIENCE_DB"
    init_json_file "$VERSIONS_JSON"
    init_json_file "$CURRENT_STATE"
    touch "$HEARTBEAT"
    SUCCESSFUL_STEPS+=("Initialize directories")
}

init_json_file() { echo '[]' > "$1" 2>/dev/null || log_warning "Failed to initialize $1"; }

init_performance_tracking() {
    [[ ! -f "$PERF_STATS" ]] && jq -n \
        --arg ts "$(date +%s)" \
        '{
            version: "2.3",
            start_time: ($ts | tonumber),
            file_count: 0,
            processed_files: 0,
            transformed_files: 0,
            cache_hits: 0,
            cache_misses: 0,
            operations: []
        }' > "$PERF_STATS"
    CHANGED_FILES+=("$PERF_STATS")
}

# ===== DEPENDENCY MANAGEMENT =====
install_dependencies() {
    log_info "Installing dependencies..."
    local PM=""
    case "$PLATFORM" in
        linux) PM="apt-get -y install" ;;
        macos) PM="brew install" ;;
        windows) PM="choco install -y" ;;
        *) log_error "QRP-ERR-028" "No package manager found" ;;
    esac

    local TOOLS=(sqlite3 jq parallel realpath awscli docker.io docker-compose kubectl node npm pnpm python3)
    for tool in "${TOOLS[@]}"; do
        if ! check_command "$tool"; then
            log_info "Installing $tool..."
            sudo $PM "$tool" || log_error "QRP-ERR-029" "Failed to install $tool"
            log_security_event "TOOL_INSTALLED" "$tool"
        fi
    done
    if ! version_ge "$(node -v 2>/dev/null | sed 's/v//')" "18.18.0"; then
        log_error "QRP-ERR-030" "Node.js v18.18.0 required"
    fi
    if ! version_ge "$(pnpm -v 2>/dev/null)" "8.0.0"; then
        log_error "QRP-ERR-031" "pnpm v8.0.0 required"
    fi
    if ! check_command pip3; then
        sudo $PM python3-pip
    fi
    pip3 install keyring requests 2>/dev/null || log_warning "Failed to install Python packages"
    SUCCESSFUL_STEPS+=("Install dependencies")
}

# ===== PATH ALIGNMENT ENGINE =====
resolve_path() {
    local context_file=$1 import_path=$2
    local cache_key="${context_file}|${import_path}"
    
    if [[ -n "${PATH_CACHE[$cache_key]:-}" ]]; then
        ((CACHE_HITS++))
        echo "${PATH_CACHE[$cache_key]}"
        return
    fi
    
    ((CACHE_MISSES++))
    local resolved_path
    
    if [[ "$import_path" =~ ^@[^/]+/ ]]; then
        resolved_path="$import_path"
    elif [[ "$import_path" =~ \.json$ ]]; then
        resolved_path=$(realpath --relative-to="$(dirname "$context_file")" "${REPO_ROOT}/$import_path" 2>/dev/null || echo "$import_path")
    elif [[ -f "${REPO_ROOT}/tsconfig.json" ]]; then
        resolved_path=$(jq -r '.compilerOptions.paths | to_entries[] | 
            select(.key | sub("\\*$"; "") as $prefix | "'"$import_path"'" | startswith($prefix)) | .value[0]' \
            "${REPO_ROOT}/tsconfig.json" | head -1)
    else
        local sanitized_path=$(sql_sanitize "$import_path")
        resolved_path=$(sqlite3 "$CACHE_DB" "SELECT new_path FROM path_mappings WHERE original = '$sanitized_path' LIMIT 1;")
    fi
    
    [[ -z "$resolved_path" ]] && resolved_path="$import_path"
    PATH_CACHE["$cache_key"]="$resolved_path"
    sqlite3 "$CACHE_DB" "INSERT OR REPLACE INTO path_mappings (original, new_path, feature) VALUES ('$(sql_sanitize "$import_path")', '$(sql_sanitize "$resolved_path")', 'path_resolution');"
    echo "${resolved_path%.*}"
}

path_alignment() {
    local start_ts=$(date +%s%N)
    local LOG_FILE="${LOG_DIR}/path_alignment-$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).log"
    
    log_info "===== PATH ALIGNMENT STARTED =====" | tee "$LOG_FILE"
    save_state "path_alignment" "Processing files"
    check_resources
    create_backup_snapshot
    
    sqlite3 "$CACHE_DB" <<EOL
        PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL;
        PRAGMA synchronous=NORMAL;
        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS path_mappings (
            original TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
            new_path TEXT NOT NULL,
            feature TEXT NOT NULL,
            last_used INTEGER DEFAULT (strftime('%s','now'))
        );
        CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_feature ON path_mappings(feature);
        DELETE FROM path_mappings;
EOL

    if [[ -f "$PATH_MAPPING" ]]; then
        while IFS='|' read -r _ old new feature _; do
            local sanitized_old=$(sql_sanitize "$old")
            local sanitized_new=$(sql_sanitize "$new")
            sqlite3 "$CACHE_DB" <<EOL
                INSERT OR REPLACE INTO path_mappings (original, new_path, feature)
                VALUES ('$(printf "%q" "$sanitized_old")', '$(printf "%q" "$sanitized_new")', '$(printf "%q" "$feature")');
EOL
        done < <(tail -n +3 "$PATH_MAPPING")
    else
        log_warning "PATH_MAPPING.md not found, generating default mappings"
        generate_default_mappings
    fi

    local find_cmd="find \"$REPO_ROOT\" -type f \( -name '*.ts' -o -name '*.tsx' -o -name '*.js' -o -name '*.jsx' -o -name '*.vue' \)"
    if $INCREMENTAL && [[ -f "$LAST_RUN_FILE" ]]; then
        find_cmd+=" -newer \"$LAST_RUN_FILE\""
    fi
    find_cmd+=" -not -path \"*/node_modules/*\" -not -path \"*/.git/*\""

    local total_files=$(eval "$find_cmd -printf '.' | wc -c")
    jq --arg count "$total_files" '.file_count = ($count|tonumber)' "$PERF_STATS" > tmp.json && mv tmp.json "$PERF_STATS"

    if check_command kubectl && kubectl get nodes &>/dev/null; then
        distribute_jobs "$total_files"
    else
        eval "$find_cmd -print0" | parallel -0 -j $(nproc) --eta --joblog "${LOG_DIR}/parallel.log" --bar process_single_file
    fi

    validate_path_changes
    touch "$LAST_RUN_FILE"
    update_changelog "Path Alignment" "Processed $total_files files, $CACHE_HITS cache hits, $CACHE_MISSES cache misses"
    save_state "operational" "Path alignment completed"
    log_info "===== PATH ALIGNMENT COMPLETED =====" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"
    
    local duration=$(( ($(date +%s%N) - start_ts) / 1000000 ))
    jq --arg op "path_alignment" --arg dur "$duration" --arg hits "$CACHE_HITS" --arg misses "$CACHE_MISSES" \
        '.operations += [{"name": $op, "duration_ms": ($dur|tonumber)}] | .cache_hits = ($hits|tonumber) | .cache_misses = ($misses|tonumber)' \
        "$PERF_STATS" > tmp.json && mv tmp.json "$PERF_STATS"
    CHANGED_FILES+=("$PERF_STATS" "$LOG_FILE")
    SUCCESSFUL_STEPS+=("Path alignment")
}

generate_default_mappings() {
    log_info "Generating default PATH_MAPPING.md"
    cat > "$PATH_MAPPING" <<EOL
# Path Mappings
| Original Path | New Path | Feature | Notes |
|---------------|----------|---------|-------|
| src/ | @src/ | Alias Resolution | Root source directory |
| shared/ | @shared/ | Shared Module | Shared utilities |
EOL
    CHANGED_FILES+=("$PATH_MAPPING")
}

distribute_jobs() {
    local total_files=$1
    local batch_size=$((total_files / 50 + 1))
    
    kubectl apply -f - <<EOL
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: toolsync-path-worker-$(date +%s)
  namespace: toolsync
spec:
  parallelism: 50
  completions: 50
  template:
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: worker
        image: toolsync-worker:2.3
        command: ["/bin/bash", "-c", "process_batch {{.batch}}"]
        volumeMounts:
        - name: repo-data
          mountPath: /data
        env:
        - name: ENCRYPTION_KEY
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: toolsync-secrets
              key: encryption-key
      restartPolicy: Never
      volumes:
      - name: repo-data
        persistentVolumeClaim:
          claimName: toolsync-pvc
EOL
}

# ===== ENVIRONMENT SYNCHRONIZATION =====
environment_sync() {
    local start_ts=$(date +%s%N)
    local LOG_FILE="${LOG_DIR}/env_sync-$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).log"
    
    log_info "===== ENVIRONMENT SYNCHRONIZATION STARTED ($ENVIRONMENT) =====" | tee "$LOG_FILE"
    save_state "env_sync" "Synchronizing $ENVIRONMENT environment"
    
    declare -A envs=( [dev]=1 [staging]=2 [production]=3 )
    for env in "${!envs[@]}"; do
        if ! kubectl get namespace "$env" &>/dev/null; then
            kubectl create namespace "$env"
            log_security_event "NAMESPACE_CREATED" "$env"
        fi
        
        log_info "Synchronizing $env environment..." | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"
        local policy_file=$(find "$K8S_CONFIG_DIR" -name "network-policies.yaml" | head -1)
        [[ -f "$policy_file" ]] && kubectl apply -f "$policy_file" -n "$env"
        
        if $DRY_RUN; then
            kubectl apply -f "$K8S_CONFIG_DIR/$env" --dry-run=server || \
                log_error "QRP-ERR-001" "Kubernetes dry-run failed for $env environment"
        else
            for manifest in $(find "$K8S_CONFIG_DIR/$env" -name '*.yaml' 2>/dev/null); do
                sign_artifact "$manifest"
                kubectl apply -f "$manifest" || \
                    log_error "QRP-ERR-002" "Kubernetes apply failed: $manifest"
                verify_artifact_integrity "$manifest"
            done
        fi
    done
    
    validate_environment_consistency
    update_changelog "Environment Sync" "Synchronized $ENVIRONMENT environment"
    save_state "operational" "Environment sync completed"
    log_info "===== ENVIRONMENT SYNCHRONIZATION COMPLETED =====" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"
    
    local duration=$(( ($(date +%s%N) - start_ts) / 1000000 ))
    jq --arg op "environment_sync" --arg dur "$duration" \
        '.operations += [{"name": $op, "duration_ms": ($dur|tonumber)}]' \
        "$PERF_STATS" > tmp.json && mv tmp.json "$PERF_STATS"
    CHANGED_FILES+=("$PERF_STATS" "$LOG_FILE")
    SUCCESSFUL_STEPS+=("Environment sync")
}

# ===== ARTIFACT SIGNING AND VERIFICATION =====
sign_artifact() {
    local file="$1"
    openssl dgst -sha256 -sign "${REPO_ROOT}/.keys/ecdsa_private.pem" -out "${file}.sig" "$file"
    git add "${file}.sig" && git commit -m "Signed artifact: $(basename "$file")" -q || true
    log_security_event "ARTIFACT_SIGNED" "File: $file"
    CHANGED_FILES+=("${file}.sig")
}

verify_artifact_integrity() {
    local file="$1"
    if ! openssl dgst -sha256 -verify "${REPO_ROOT}/.keys/ecdsa_public.pem" -signature "${file}.sig" "$file"; then
        log_error "QRP-ERR-004" "File $file failed integrity verification"
    fi
    log_security_event "ARTIFACT_VERIFIED" "File: $file"
}

# ===== BACKUP AND RECOVERY =====
create_backup_snapshot() {
    local snapshot_id="snap-$(date +%s)"
    local primary_dir="${BACKUP_DIR}/${snapshot_id}"
    
    mkdir -p "$primary_dir"
    rsync -av --delete --exclude='backups/*' "${REPO_ROOT}/" "$primary_dir/" || {
        log_warning "Backup failed, trying fallback: /c/Users/rehan/openQuran_backup"
        mkdir -p "/c/Users/rehan/openQuran_backup"
        rsync -av --delete "${REPO_ROOT}/" "/c/Users/rehan/openQuran_backup/${snapshot_id}/" || \
            log_error "QRP-ERR-005" "Fallback backup failed"
    }
    
    aws s3 sync "$primary_dir" "$BACKUP_STORAGE/$snapshot_id" --sse AES256 || \
        log_error "QRP-ERR-006" "S3 backup sync failed"
    if check_command velero; then
        velero backup create "toolsync-$snapshot_id" --include-namespaces toolsync || true
    fi
    log_security_event "SNAPSHOT_CREATED" "Snapshot ID: $snapshot_id"
    CHANGED_FILES+=("$primary_dir")
}

restore_snapshot() {
    local snapshot_id="$1"
    aws s3 sync "$BACKUP_STORAGE/$snapshot_id" "${BACKUP_DIR}/restore_$(date +%s)" || \
        log_error "QRP-ERR-007" "S3 restore failed"
    rsync -av --delete "${BACKUP_DIR}/restore_$(date +%s)/" "${REPO_ROOT}/" || \
        log_error "QRP-ERR-008" "Restore rsync failed"
    if check_command velero; then
        velero restore create --from-backup "toolsync-$snapshot_id" || \
            log_warning "Velero restore failed"
    fi
    log_security_event "RESTORE_COMPLETED" "Restored snapshot: $snapshot_id"
    update_changelog "Snapshot Restore" "Restored snapshot $snapshot_id"
    save_state "operational" "Snapshot $snapshot_id restored"
}

# ===== THREAT AND LOG MONITORING =====
monitor_threats() {
    log_info "Starting real-time threat and log monitoring..."
    save_state "monitoring" "Starting threat detection"
    local monitor_cmd
    if [[ "$PLATFORM" == "linux" && -n "$(check_command inotifywait)" ]]; then
        monitor_cmd="inotifywait -q -m -r -e create,modify,delete \"$REPO_ROOT\""
    elif [[ "$PLATFORM" == "macos" && -n "$(check_command fswatch)" ]]; then
        monitor_cmd="fswatch -r \"$REPO_ROOT\""
    else
        log_warning "No monitoring tool available, falling back to periodic checks"
        while true; do
            check_threats
            sleep 60
        done
    fi

    eval "$monitor_cmd" | while read -r directory event file; do
        local full_path="${directory}${file}"
        if [[ "$full_path" == *.log ]]; then
            check_log "$full_path"
        elif [[ "$full_path" == *.sh || "$full_path" == *.py || "$full_path" == *.js ]]; then
            local threat_level=$(analyze_threat "$full_path")
            if [[ "$threat_level" -gt 7 ]]; then
                notify "CRITICAL threat detected in $full_path (Level: $threat_level)"
                quarantine_file "$full_path"
            fi
        fi
    done
}

check_log() {
    local log_file="$1"
    if grep -q "ERROR" "$log_file"; then
        local error_msg=$(grep "ERROR" "$log_file" | tail -1)
        notify "Error detected in $log_file: $error_msg"
        ai_resolve_error "log_error" "$error_msg" "$log_file"
    fi
}

analyze_threat() {
    local file="$1"
    local score=0
    if grep -qE "(rm -rf|eval|exec|chmod 777)" "$file"; then
        ((score+=5))
    fi
    if [[ $(stat -c %s "$file" 2>/dev/null || stat -f %z "$file") -gt 1000000 ]]; then
        ((score+=3))
    fi
    echo "$score"
}

quarantine_file() {
    local file="$1"
    local hash=$(sha256sum "$file" | awk '{print $1}')
    local timestamp=$(date +%s)
    
    mv "$file" "${QUARANTINE_DIR}/${timestamp}_$(basename "$file")" || \
        log_error "QRP-ERR-009" "Quarantine failed for $file"
    log_security_event "QUARANTINE" "File: $(basename "$file")"
    CHANGED_FILES+=("${QUARANTINE_DIR}/${timestamp}_$(basename "$file")")
}

# ===== AI-DRIVEN ERROR RESOLUTION =====
create_prompt_library() {
    local PROMPT_LIBRARY="${REPO_ROOT}/scripts/prompt_library.sh"
    log_info "Creating prompt library..."
    mkdir -p "${REPO_ROOT}/scripts"
    cat << EOF > "$PROMPT_LIBRARY"
#!/bin/bash
# Prompt Library for AI-driven error resolution
# Usage: source \$PROMPT_LIBRARY; ai_prompt "error_type" "context"

ai_prompt() {
  local error_type="\$1" context="\$2"
  case "\$error_type" in
    "typescript_error")
      echo "Analyze this TypeScript error and suggest a fix: \$context"
      ;;
    "git_conflict")
      echo "Explain how to resolve this Git merge conflict in VS Code: \$context"
      ;;
    "pnpm_install")
      echo "Diagnose this pnpm install failure and provide a solution: \$context"
      ;;
    "log_error")
      echo "Analyze this log error and suggest remediation: \$context"
      ;;
    *)
      echo "Unknown error type: \$error_type. Context: \$context"
      ;;
  esac
}
EOF
    chmod +x "$PROMPT_LIBRARY"
    CHANGED_FILES+=("$PROMPT_LIBRARY")
    SUCCESSFUL_STEPS+=("Create prompt library")
}

ai_resolve_error() {
    local error_type="$1" context="$2" log_file="$3"
    log_info "Attempting AI-driven error resolution for $error_type"
    if [[ -f "${REPO_ROOT}/scripts/prompt_library.sh" ]]; then
        source "${REPO_ROOT}/scripts/prompt_library.sh"
        local prompt=$(ai_prompt "$error_type" "$context")
        log_info "AI Prompt: $prompt"
        # Placeholder for AI API call (e.g., Grok)
        log_info "AI suggested: Check $log_file or consult ${DOCS_DIR}/TROUBLESHOOTING.md"
    else
        create_prompt_library
    fi
}

update_experience() {
    local error_type="$1" context="$2" output="$3" resolution="$4"
    local entry=$(jq -n \
        --arg type "$error_type" \
        --arg ctx "$context" \
        --arg out "$output" \
        --arg res "$resolution" \
        --arg ts "$(date +'%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')" \
        '{type: $type, context: $ctx, output: $out, resolution: $res, timestamp: $ts}')
    if [[ -f "$EXPERIENCE_DB" ]]; then
        jq "[($entry)] + . | .[:50]" "$EXPERIENCE_DB" > "$EXPERIENCE_DB.tmp" && mv "$EXPERIENCE_DB.tmp" "$EXPERIENCE_DB"
    else
        echo "[$entry]" > "$EXPERIENCE_DB"
    fi
    CHANGED_FILES+=("$EXPERIENCE_DB")
}

# ===== CHANGELOG MANAGEMENT =====
update_changelog() {
    local operation="$1" details="$2"
    log_info "Updating changelog..."
    local commit_hash=$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo "N/A")
    cat << EOF >> "$CHANGELOG"
## [v2.3] - $(date +'%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
- **Operation**: $operation
- **Details**: $details
- **Commit**: $commit_hash
EOF
    jq --arg version "2.3" --arg ts "$(date +'%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')" --arg op "$operation" \
       '. += [{"version":$version, "timestamp":$ts, "operation":$op}]' "$VERSIONS_JSON" > tmp.json && mv tmp.json "$VERSIONS_JSON"
    CHANGED_FILES+=("$CHANGELOG" "$VERSIONS_JSON")
    git add "$CHANGELOG" "$VERSIONS_JSON" && git commit -m "Update changelog: $operation" -q || true
}

# ===== RESOURCE CHECKS =====
check_resources() {
    local disk_space_mb=$(get_disk_free_mb "$REPO_ROOT")
    local memory_free_mb=$(get_memory_free_mb)
    local asset_count=$(find "$ASSET_DIR" -type f | wc -l)
    local largest_asset_mb=$(find "$ASSET_DIR" -type f -exec stat -c %s {} \; 2>/dev/null | sort -nr | head -1 | awk '{print $1/1024/1024}' || echo 0)

    jq -n \
        --arg timestamp "$(date)" \
        --arg disk "$disk_space_mb" \
        --arg memory "$memory_free_mb" \
        --arg assets "$asset_count" \
        --arg largest_asset "$largest_asset_mb" \
        '{
          "timestamp": $timestamp,
          "disk_mb": ($disk | tonumber),
          "memory_mb": ($memory | tonumber),
          "asset_count": ($assets | tonumber),
          "largest_asset_mb": ($largest_asset | tonumber)
        }' > "${METRICS_DIR}/capacity_metrics.json"
    
    if [[ "$disk_space_mb" -lt "$MIN_DISK_SPACE_MB" ]]; then
        log_warning "Low disk space: ${disk_space_mb}MB (min: ${MIN_DISK_SPACE_MB}MB)"
        notify "CRITICAL: Low disk space (${disk_space_mb}MB)"
    fi
    if [[ "$memory_free_mb" -lt "$MIN_MEMORY_MB" ]]; then
        log_warning "Low memory: ${memory_free_mb}MB (min: ${MIN_MEMORY_MB}MB)"
        notify "CRITICAL: Low memory (${memory_free_mb}MB)"
    fi
    if [[ "$(echo "$largest_asset_mb > $MAX_ASSET_SIZE_MB" | bc)" -eq 1 ]]; then
        log_warning "Large asset detected: ${largest_asset_mb}MB (max: ${MAX_ASSET_SIZE_MB}MB)"
        compress_large_assets
    fi
    CHANGED_FILES+=("${METRICS_DIR}/capacity_metrics.json")
    SUCCESSFUL_STEPS+=("Check resources")
}

compress_large_assets() {
    log_info "Compressing large assets..."
    find "$ASSET_DIR" -type f -size +${MAX_ASSET_SIZE_MB}M | while read -r file; do
        if [[ "$file" =~ \.(png|jpg|jpeg)$ ]]; then
            convert "$file" -quality 85 "${file%.png}_compressed.png"
            mv "${file%.png}_compressed.png" "$file"
            log_info "Compressed: $file"
            CHANGED_FILES+=("$file")
        fi
    done
}

# ===== FILE PROCESSING =====
process_single_file() {
    local file="$1"
    local temp_file=$(mktemp)
    local changes=0
    
    if [[ "$file" == *"node_modules"* || "$(basename "$file")" == .* ]]; then
        return
    fi

    while IFS= read -r line; do
        if [[ "$line" =~ (from\s+|import\s+|require\([\'\"])([^\'\"]+)([\'\"]) ]]; then
            local import_path="${BASH_REMATCH[2]}"
            local new_path=$(resolve_path "$file" "$import_path")
            
            if [[ "$new_path" != "$import_path" ]]; then
                line="${line/$import_path/$new_path}"
                ((changes++))
            fi
        fi
        echo "$line" >> "$temp_file"
    done < "$file"
    
    if (( changes > 0 )); then
        if $DRY_RUN; then
            log_info "DRY RUN: Would transform $file ($changes changes)" | tee -a "${LOG_DIR}/dry_run.log"
        else
            cp "$file" "${BACKUP_DIR}/$(date +%s)_$(basename "$file")"
            mv "$temp_file" "$file"
            log_security_event "FILE_TRANSFORMED" "Transformed $file ($changes changes)"
            jq '.transformed_files += 1' "$PERF_STATS" > tmp.json && mv tmp.json "$PERF_STATS"
            CHANGED_FILES+=("$file" "${BACKUP_DIR}/$(date +%s)_$(basename "$file")" "$PERF_STATS")
        fi
    else
        rm "$temp_file"
    fi
}

# ===== VALIDATION =====
validate_path_changes() {
    log_info "===== PATH VALIDATION STARTED ====="
    local error_count=0
    local temp_errors=$(mktemp)
    
    find "$REPO_ROOT" -type f \( -name '*.ts' -o -name '*.tsx' -o -name '*.js' -o -name '*.jsx' -o -name '*.vue' \) \
        -not -path "*/node_modules/*" \
        -not -path "*/.git/*" \
        -exec awk -v repo="$REPO_ROOT" '
        /from\s+["']|import\s+["']|require\(["']/ {
            for(i=1; i<=NF; i++) {
                if ($i ~ /from|import|require/) {
                    split($(i+1), parts, /["']/);
                    if (length(parts) >= 2 && system("test -e \"" repo "/" parts[2] "\"") != 0) {
                        print FILENAME ":" NR ": Path validation failed: " parts[2];
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        ' {} + > "$temp_errors"
    
    if [[ -s "$temp_errors" ]]; then
        error_count=$(wc -l < "$temp_errors")
        cat "$temp_errors" >> "${LOG_DIR}/validation_errors.log"
        notify "Path validation failed with $error_count errors"
        CHANGED_FILES+=("${LOG_DIR}/validation_errors.log")
    fi
    rm "$temp_errors"

    if check_command tsc; then
        local ts_errors=$(tsc --noEmit --pretty false 2>&1 | tee -a "${LOG_DIR}/ts_errors.log" | wc -l)
        if [[ "$ts_errors" -gt 0 ]]; then
            log_security_event "TYPESCRIPT_ERROR" "TypeScript validation failed with $ts_errors errors"
            ai_resolve_error "typescript_error" "$(cat "${LOG_DIR}/ts_errors.log")" "${LOG_DIR}/ts_errors.log"
            CHANGED_FILES+=("${LOG_DIR}/ts_errors.log")
        fi
    fi
    SUCCESSFUL_STEPS+=("Path validation")
}

validate_environment_consistency() {
    log_info "===== ENVIRONMENT VALIDATION STARTED ====="
    for ns in dev staging production; do
        kubectl get ns "$ns" &>/dev/null || kubectl create namespace "$ns"
        local policy_file=$(find "$K8S_CONFIG_DIR" -name "policies.yaml" | head -1)
        [[ -f "$policy_file" ]] && kubectl apply -f "$policy_file" -n "$ns"
        local net_policy=$(find "$K8S_CONFIG_DIR" -name "network-policies.yaml" | head -1)
        [[ -f "$net_policy" ]] && kubectl apply -f "$net_policy" -n "$ns"
    done
    SUCCESSFUL_STEPS+=("Environment validation")
}

# ===== PERFORMANCE REPORTING =====
generate_performance_report() {
    jq -c . "$PERF_STATS" > "${METRICS_DIR}/perf_$(date +%s).json"
    cat > "${METRICS_DIR}/report_$(date +%Y%m%d).md" <<EOL
# ToolSync Performance Report - $(date)

## Metrics
\`\`\`json
$(cat "$PERF_STATS")
\`\`\`

## Security Audit Summary
\`\`\`json
$(tail -n 10 "$AUDIT_LOG")
\`\`\`

## Directory Structure
\`\`\`json
$(cat "${METRICS_DIR}/structure.json")
\`\`\`
EOL
    CHANGED_FILES+=("${METRICS_DIR}/perf_$(date +%s).json" "${METRICS_DIR}/report_$(date +%Y%m%d).md")
    SUCCESSFUL_STEPS+=("Generate performance report")
}

# ===== ERROR HANDLING =====
handle_error() {
    local err_code=$1 line_no=$2
    local error_msg="ToolSync Failure [Code:$err_code] at line $line_no"
    
    notify "$error_msg"
    log_error "QRP-ERR-003" "$error_msg"
    create_backup_snapshot
    [[ -f "$LOCK_FILE" ]] && rm -f "$LOCK_FILE"
    save_state "failed" "Error: $error_msg"
    exit $err_code
}

# ===== GIT INTEGRATION =====
git_sync() {
    if ! $CHECK_GIT; then
        log_info "Skipping Git sync"
        return 0
    fi
    log_info "Syncing with $GITHUB_URL..."
    if ! git status >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        log_error "QRP-ERR-032" "Not a Git repository"
    fi
    run_cmd "git fetch origin" || log_error "QRP-ERR-033" "Failed to fetch from origin"
    run_cmd "git checkout main" || log_error "QRP-ERR-034" "Failed to checkout main"
    run_cmd "git pull origin main" || {
        log_warning "Merge conflict detected"
        ai_resolve_error "git_conflict" "Merge conflict during pull" "${LOG_DIR}/toolsync.log"
        log_error "QRP-ERR-035" "Git pull failed"
    }
    run_cmd "git checkout -b $BRANCH_NAME" || log_error "QRP-ERR-036" "Failed to create branch $BRANCH_NAME"
    log_info "Synced and branched to $BRANCH_NAME"
    SUCCESSFUL_STEPS+=("Git sync")
}

git_publish() {
    if ! $CHECK_GIT; then
        log_info "Skipping Git publish"
        return 0
    fi
    log_info "Publishing changes..."
    if [ ${#CHANGED_FILES[@]} -gt 0 ]; then
        for file in "${CHANGED_FILES[@]}"; do
            run_cmd "git add $file"
        done
        if run_cmd "git commit -m 'ToolSync v2.3 auto-update [$ENVIRONMENT]' -q" && run_cmd "git push -u origin $BRANCH_NAME"; then
            log_info "Pushed to $BRANCH_NAME"
            if $AUTO_PR && check_command gh; then
                run_cmd "gh pr create --base main --head $BRANCH_NAME --title 'ToolSync v2.3 Update [$ENVIRONMENT]' --body 'Automated update from toolsync.sh'"
                log_info "PR created: $GITHUB_URL/compare/$BRANCH_NAME...main"
            fi
        else
            log_info "No changes to commit"
        fi
    else
        log_info "No changes to publish"
    fi
    SUCCESSFUL_STEPS+=("Git publish")
}

# ===== RECOVERY WORKFLOW =====
retry_operation() {
    local operation="$1" description="$2"
    local attempt=0
    while [ $attempt -lt $MAX_RETRIES ]; do
        ((attempt++))
        notify "Attempt $attempt/$MAX_RETRIES: $description"
        if $operation; then
            notify "$description completed"
            return 0
        fi
        notify "Retrying in $RETRY_DELAY seconds..."
        sleep $RETRY_DELAY
    done
    notify "FAILED: $description after $MAX_RETRIES attempts"
    return 1
}

fix_filesystem() {
    notify "Repairing filesystem..."
    find "$REPO_ROOT" -type d -exec chmod 755 {} \; || return 1
    find "$REPO_ROOT" -type f -exec chmod 644 {} \;
    rsync -a --exclude='backups/*' "${ASSET_DIR}/" "${BACKUP_DIR}/backup_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)/"
    return 0
}

fix_github_auth() {
    notify "Configuring GitHub authentication..."
    authenticate_user "admin" || return 1
    return 0
}

install_project_dependencies() {
    notify "Installing project dependencies..."
    check_command pnpm || npm install -g pnpm@8.0.0
    pnpm install --strict-peer-dependencies || return 1
    check_command docker && docker info >/dev/null 2>&1 || return 1
    return 0
}

build_projects() {
    notify "Building projects..."
    pnpm build || {
        notify "Applying TS2693 fixes..."
        find "$REPO_ROOT" -type f -name "*.ts*" -exec sed -i 's/UserRole/UserRoleEnum/g' {} \;
        pnpm build || return 1
    }
    return 0
}

run_recovery() {
    notify "🚀 STARTING RECOVERY PROCESS"
    save_state "recovering" "Stage 1: Filesystem repair"
    retry_operation fix_filesystem "Filesystem repair" || return 1

    save_state "recovering" "Stage 2: GitHub authentication"
    retry_operation fix_github_auth "GitHub authentication" || return 1

    save_state "recovering" "Stage 3: Dependency installation"
    retry_operation install_project_dependencies "Dependency installation" || return 1

    save_state "recovering" "Stage 4: Building projects"
    retry_operation build_projects "Building projects" || return 1

    save_state "operational" "All systems recovered"
    notify "✅ RECOVERY COMPLETED"
}

# ===== MAIN EXECUTION =====
main() {
    while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
        case "$1" in
            --dry-run) DRY_RUN=true ;;
            --incremental) INCREMENTAL=true ;;
            --verbose) VERBOSE=true ;;
            --debug) DEBUG=true; VERBOSE=true ;;
            --auto-pr) AUTO_PR=true ;;
            --no-git) CHECK_GIT=false ;;
            --clean) CLEAN=true ;;
            --prefer-offline) PREFER_OFFLINE=true ;;
            --production) ENVIRONMENT="production" ;;
            --force) FORCE=true ;;
            *) break ;;
        esac
        shift
    done

    init_directories
    install_dependencies
    init_security
    authenticate_user "admin"
    init_performance_tracking
    create_prompt_library
    
    case "${1:-}" in
        path-align)
            path_alignment
            ;;
        env-sync)
            environment_sync
            ;;
        full)
            path_alignment
            environment_sync
            ;;
        restore)
            latest_snapshot=$(ls -td "${BACKUP_DIR}/snap_"* | head -1 | xargs basename)
            [[ -n "$latest_snapshot" ]] && restore_snapshot "$latest_snapshot"
            ;;
        monitor)
            monitor_threats
            ;;
        recover)
            run_recovery
            ;;
        *) 
            log_info "Usage: $0 [path-align|env-sync|full|restore|monitor|recover] [--dry-run|--incremental|--verbose|--debug|--auto-pr|--no-git|--clean|--prefer-offline|--production|--force]"
            exit 1
            ;;
    esac
    
    generate_performance_report
    git_sync
    git_publish
    [[ -f "$LOCK_FILE" ]] && rm -f "$LOCK_FILE"
    save_state "operational" "ToolSync v2.3 completed"
    log_info "ToolSync v2.3 completed successfully. Review $GITHUB_URL/compare/$BRANCH_NAME...main"
    for file in "${CHANGED_FILES[@]}"; do
        echo "file://$REPO_ROOT/$file"
    done
}

main "$@"
Supporting Scripts
1. Recovery System Script (scripts/recovery_system.sh)
Implements the retry strategy with the provided Mermaid workflow, manual overrides, and Slack notifications.
bash
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail
trap 'handle_error $? $LINENO' ERR

# Quran Platform Recovery System (v4.3)
# Location: /c/envs/OneDrive/Desktop/openQuran/Design/scripts/recovery_system.sh
DESIGN_DIR="/c/envs/OneDrive/Desktop/openQuran/Design"
PROD_DIR="/c/Users/rehan/OneDrive/Desktop/openQuran/Production"
REPO_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || realpath .)
STATE_DIR=$(find "$REPO_ROOT" -type d -name "state" | head -1 || echo "$REPO_ROOT/collaboration/state")
LOG_DIR=$(find "$REPO_ROOT" -type d -name "logs" | head -1 || echo "$REPO_ROOT/collaboration/logs")
MONITOR_DIR=$(find "$REPO_ROOT" -type d -name "monitoring" | head -1 || echo "$REPO_ROOT/monitoring")
BACKUP_DIR=$(find "$REPO_ROOT" -type d -name "backups" | head -1 || echo "$REPO_ROOT/.backups")
CURRENT_STATE="$STATE_DIR/system_state.json"
LAST_UPDATE="$STATE_DIR/last_update"
HEARTBEAT="$MONITOR_DIR/heartbeat"
STATUS_LOG="$LOG_DIR/recovery_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).log"
MAX_RETRIES=3
RETRY_DELAY=60
SLACK_WEBHOOK="${SLACK_WEBHOOK:-}"

. "${REPO_ROOT}/scripts/lib/utils.sh"

init_state() {
    mkdir -p "$STATE_DIR" "$LOG_DIR" "$MONITOR_DIR" "$BACKUP_DIR"
    if [[ ! -f "$CURRENT_STATE" ]]; then
        jq -n --arg ts "$(date -Is)" '{"timestamp":$ts, "state":"initializing", "details":"Starting recovery"}' > "$CURRENT_STATE"
    fi
}

notify() {
    local message="$1"
    log_info "[$(date)] $message"
    if [[ -n "$SLACK_WEBHOOK" ]]; then
        curl -s -X POST -H 'Content-type: application/json' --data "{\"text\":\"$message\"}" "$SLACK_WEBHOOK" || log_warning "Slack alert failed"
    fi
}

save_state() {
    jq -n --arg ts "$(date -Is)" --arg state "$1" --arg details "$2" \
       '{"timestamp":$ts, "state":$state, "details":$details}' > "$CURRENT_STATE"
    date +%s > "$LAST_UPDATE"
    touch "$HEARTBEAT"
}

retry_operation() {
    local operation="$1" description="$2"
    local attempt=0
    while [[ $attempt -lt $MAX_RETRIES ]]; do
        ((attempt++))
        notify "Attempt $attempt/$MAX_RETRIES: $description"
        if $operation; then
            notify "$description completed"
            return 0
        fi
        notify "Retrying in $RETRY_DELAY seconds..."
        sleep $RETRY_DELAY
    done
    notify "FAILED: $description after $MAX_RETRIES attempts"
    return 1
}

fix_filesystem() {
    notify "Repairing filesystem..."
    find "$DESIGN_DIR" "$PROD_DIR" -type d -exec chmod 755 {} \; || return 1
    find "$DESIGN_DIR" "$PROD_DIR" -type f -exec chmod 644 {} \;
    rsync -a --exclude='backups/*' "$REPO_ROOT/assets/" "$BACKUP_DIR/backup_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)/"
    return 0
}

fix_github_auth() {
    notify "Configuring GitHub authentication..."
    if [[ -f ~/.git-credentials ]]; then
        return 0
    fi
    read -sp "Enter GitHub PAT: " token
    echo
    echo "https://Rehan719:$token@github.com" > ~/.git-credentials
    chmod 600 ~/.git-credentials
    git config --global credential.helper store
    curl -s -H "Authorization: token $token" https://api.github.com/user | grep -q '"login"' || return 1
    return 0
}

install_dependencies() {
    notify "Installing dependencies..."
    command -v pnpm || npm install -g pnpm@8.0.0
    pnpm install --strict-peer-dependencies || return 1
    command -v docker && docker info >/dev/null 2>&1 || return 1
    return 0
}

build_projects() {
    notify "Building projects..."
    pnpm build || {
        notify "Applying TS2693 fixes..."
        find "$DESIGN_DIR" "$PROD_DIR" -type f -name "*.ts*" -exec sed -i 's/UserRole/UserRoleEnum/g' {} \;
        pnpm build || return 1
    }
    return 0
}

run_recovery() {
    notify "🚀 STARTING RECOVERY PROCESS"
    save_state "recovering" "Stage 1: Filesystem repair"
    retry_operation fix_filesystem "Filesystem repair" || return 1

    save_state "recovering" "Stage 2: GitHub authentication"
    retry_operation fix_github_auth "GitHub authentication" || return 1

    save_state "recovering" "Stage 3: Dependency installation"
    retry_operation install_dependencies "Dependency installation" || return 1

    save_state "recovering" "Stage 4: Building projects"
    retry_operation build_projects "Building projects" || return 1

    save_state "operational" "All systems recovered"
    notify "✅ RECOVERY COMPLETED"
}

monitor_system() {
    while true; do
        touch "$HEARTBEAT"
        local disk_mb=$(get_disk_free_mb "$REPO_ROOT")
        local mem_mb=$(get_memory_free_mb)
        [[ "$disk_mb" -lt 5000 ]] && notify "⚠️ CRITICAL: Low disk space (${disk_mb}MB)"
        [[ "$mem_mb" -lt 16000 ]] && notify "⚠️ CRITICAL: Low memory (${mem_mb}MB)"
        if [[ ! -f "$LAST_UPDATE" || $(( $(date +%s) - $(cat "$LAST_UPDATE") )) -gt 300 ]]; then
            save_state "unresponsive" "System not updating state"
            notify "❌ SYSTEM UNRESPONSIVE - Initiating recovery"
            run_recovery
        fi
        sleep 60
    done
}

main() {
    init_state
    case "$1" in
        start|--force) run_recovery; monitor_system & ;;
        resume) notify "↩ RESUMING OPERATIONS"; monitor_system & ;;
        status) [[ -f "$CURRENT_STATE" ]] && jq . "$CURRENT_STATE" || echo '{"state":"unknown"}' ;;
        *) echo "Usage: $0 {start|resume|status|--force}"; exit 1 ;;
    esac
}

main "$@"
Mermaid Workflow for Recovery:
markdown
graph LR
    A[State Change] --> B[Filesystem Repair]
    B --> C[GitHub Auth]
    C --> D[Dependency Install]
    D --> E[Build Projects]
    E --> F[State Update]
2. Status Dashboard (scripts/status_dashboard.sh)
Enhanced dashboard with color-coded status, manual override, and real-time metrics.
bash
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

# Quran Platform Status Dashboard (v4.3)
# Location: /c/envs/outputs/OneDrive/Workspace/openQuran/design/scripts/status_dashboard.sh
REPO_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || realpath .)
STATE_DIR=$(find "$REPO_ROOT" -type d -name "state" | head -1 || echo "$REPO_ROOT/collaboration/state")
METRICS_DIR=$(find "$REPO_ROOT" -type d -name "metrics" | head -1 || echo "$REPO_ROOT/monitoring/records")
HEARTBEAT_DIR=$(find "$REPO_ROOT" -type d -name "monitoring" | head -1 || echo "$REPO_ROOT/monitoring")
STATE_FILE="$STATE_DIR/system_state.json"
HEARTBEAT_LOG="$HEARTBEAT_DIR/records"
PERF_LOG="$METRICS_DIR/performance.json"

color_red() { echo -e "\033[31m$1\033[0m"; }
color_green() { echo -e "\033[32m$1\033[0m"; }
color_yellow() { echo -e "\033[33m$1\033[0m"; }

while true; do
    clear
    echo "QURAN SETUP SYSTEM - LIVE STATUS PANEL"
    echo "======================================"

    # System Status
    if [[ -f "$STATE_FILE" ]]; then
        STATE=$(jq -r '.state' "$STATE_FILE")
        DETAILS=$(jq -r '.details' "$STATE_FILE")
        TIMESTAMP=$(jq -r '.timestamp' "$STATE_FILE")
        case "$STATE" in
            operational) STATE=$(color_green "[$STATE]");;
            recovering) STATE=$(color_yellow "[$STATE]");;
            *) STATE=$(color_red "[$STATE]");;
        esac
    else
        STATE=$(color_red "[unknown]")
        DETAILS="No state data available"
        TIMESTAMP="N/A"
    fi

    # Resource Metrics
    DISK=$(df -h "$REPO_ROOT" | tail -1 | awk '{print $4 " free"}')
    MEM=$(free -m | awk '/Mem:/ {print $7 "MB free"}')
    [[ "$(df -h "$REPO_ROOT" | tail -1 | awk '{print $4}' | sed 's/G//')" -lt 5 ]] && DISK=$(color_red "$DISK")
    [[ "$(free -m | awk '/Mem:/ {print $7}')" -lt 16000 ]] && MEM=$(color_red "$MEM")

    # Heartbeat Status
    if [[ -f "$HEARTBEAT_LOG" ]]; then
        AGE=$(( $(date +%s) - $(stat -c %Y "$HEARTBEAT_LOG" 2>/dev/null || stat -f %Y "$HEARTBEAT_LOG") ))
        [[ "$AGE" -gt 300 ]] && HB_STATUS=$(color_red "Stale ($AGE seconds ago)") || HB_STATUS=$(color_green "Active ($AGE seconds ago)")
    else
        HB_STATUS=$(color_red "No heartbeat detected")
    fi

    # Cache Metrics
    CACHE_HITS=$(jq -r '.cache_hits // 0' "$PERF_LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
    CACHE_MISSES=$(jq -r '.cache_misses // 0' "$PERF_LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)

    echo "Status:       $STATE"
    echo "Details:      $DETAILS"
    echo "Last Updated: $TIMESTAMP"
    echo "Heartbeat:    $HB_STATUS"
    echo "Resources:    Disk: $DISK | Memory: $MEM"
    echo "Metrics:      Cache Hits: $CACHE_HITS | Cache Misses: $CACHE_MISSES"
    echo "======================================"
    echo "[r] Run Recovery   [s] System Status   [q] Quit"

    read -t 5 -n 1 input
    case "$input" in
        r) bash "$REPO_ROOT/scripts/recovery_system.sh" --force ;;
        s) jq . "$STATE_FILE" ;;
        q) exit 0 ;;
    esac
done
3. Setup Design Script (scripts/setup_design.sh)
Configures the design environment with dynamic directory detection.
bash
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail
trap 'handle_error $? $LINENO' ERR

# Quran Platform Design Environment Setup (v4.3)
# Location: /c/envs/OneDrive/Desktop/openQuran/Design/scripts/setup_design.sh
REPO_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || realpath .)
DESIGN_DIR="/c/envs/OneDrive/Desktop/openQuran/Design"
SCRIPTS_DIR=$(find "$DESIGN_DIR" -type d -name "scripts" | head -1 || echo "$DESIGN_DIR/scripts")
LIB_DIR="$SCRIPTS_DIR/lib"
COLLAB_DIR=$(find "$DESIGN_DIR" -type d -name "collaboration" | head -1 || echo "$DESIGN_DIR/collaboration")
LOG_DIR=$(find "$COLLAB_DIR" -type d -name "logs" | head -1 || echo "$COLLAB_DIR/logs")
REPORT_DIR=$(find "$COLLAB_DIR" -type d -name "reports" | head -1 || echo "$COLLAB_DIR/reports")
TASK_DIR=$(find "$COLLAB_DIR" -type d -name "tasks" | head -1 || echo "$COLLAB_DIR/tasks")
AI_CONTEXT_DIR=$(find "$COLLAB_DIR" -type d -name "llm_contexts" | head -1 || echo "$COLLAB_DIR/llm_contexts")
ASSET_DIR=$(find "$DESIGN_DIR" -type d -name "assets" | head -1 || echo "$DESIGN_DIR/assets")
ASSET_DB="$ASSET_DIR/design_assets.json"
DOCS_DIR=$(find "$DESIGN_DIR" -type d -name "documentation" | head -1 || echo "$DESIGN_DIR/documentation")
MONITOR_DIR=$(find "$DESIGN_DIR" -type d -name "monitoring" | head -1 || echo "$DESIGN_DIR/monitoring")
STATE_DIR=$(find "$COLLAB_DIR" -type d -name "state" | head -1 || echo "$COLLAB_DIR/state")
LOG_FILE="$LOG_DIR/setup_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).log"

# Source utilities
. "$LIB_DIR/utils.sh"

main() {
    log_info "===== DESIGN ENVIRONMENT SETUP (v4.3) ====="
    local start_time=$SECONDS

    # Create directory structure
    mkdir -p "$SCRIPTS_DIR" "$LIB_DIR" "$COLLAB_DIR" "$LOG_DIR" "$REPORT_DIR" \
             "$TASK_DIR" "$AI_CONTEXT_DIR" "$ASSET_DIR"/{ui_components,style_guides,wireframes,production,backups} \
             "$DOCS_DIR" "$MONITOR_DIR" "$STATE_DIR" "$DESIGN_DIR"/{.vscode,.github/workflows}
    init_json_file "$ASSET_DB"
    init_json_file "$COLLAB_DIR/knowledge/issues.json"

    # Install dependencies
    check_dependencies "git" "jq" "openssl" "rsync" "python3" "node" "pnpm"

    # Copy scripts
    copy_script "$SCRIPTS_DIR/recovery_system.sh" <(cat "${REPO_ROOT}/scripts/recovery_system.sh")
    copy_script "$SCRIPTS_DIR/workflow_manager.sh" <(cat "${REPO_ROOT}/scripts/workflow_manager.sh")
    copy_script "$SCRIPTS_DIR/health_monitor.sh" <(cat "${REPO_ROOT}/scripts/health_monitor.sh")
    copy_script "$SCRIPTS_DIR/generate_docs.sh" <(cat "${REPO_ROOT}/scripts/generate_docs.sh")
    copy_script "$SCRIPTS_DIR/verify_environment.py" <(cat "${REPO_ROOT}/scripts/verify_environment.py")
    copy_script "$SCRIPTS_DIR/status_dashboard.sh" <(cat "${REPO_ROOT}/scripts/status_dashboard.sh")
    copy_script "$LIB_DIR/utils.sh" <(cat "${REPO_ROOT}/scripts/lib/utils.sh")

    # VSCode configuration
    cat > "$DESIGN_DIR/.vscode/settings.json" <<'EOL'
{
    "files.autoSave": "afterDelay",
    "editor.formatOnSave": true,
    "git.autofetch": true,
    "terminal.integrated.profiles.windows": {
        "Git Bash": { "path": "C:\\Program Files\\Git\\bin\\bash.exe" }
    },
    "capacity.thresholds": { "disk_mb": 5000, "memory_mb": 16000, "asset_size_mb": 100 }
}
EOL
    cat > "$DESIGN_DIR/.vscode/extensions.json" <<'EOL'
{
    "recommendations": [
        "github.vscode-pull-request-github",
        "ms-vsliveshare.vsliveshare",
        "yzhang.markdown-all-in-one"
    ]
}
EOL

    # GitHub Actions
    cat > "$DESIGN_DIR/.github/workflows/design_ci.yml" <<'EOL'
name: Design CI
on:
  push:
    paths: ['Design/**']
jobs:
  validate:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - run: bash Design/scripts/verify_environment.py --full
EOL

    # Generate documentation
    bash "$SCRIPTS_DIR/generate_docs.sh"

    # Schedule health monitoring
    schedule_cron "0 9 * * * $SCRIPTS_DIR/health_monitor.sh"

    local duration=$((SECONDS - start_time))
    log_info "Setup completed in ${duration}s. Logs: $LOG_DIR"
    echo "Next: cd $DESIGN_DIR && bash scripts/recovery_system.sh start"
}

main "$@"
4. Setup Production Script (scripts/setup_production.sh)

bash
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail
trap 'handle_error $? $LINENO' ERR

# Quran Platform Production Environment Setup (v4.3)
# Location: /c/Users/rehan/OneDrive/Desktop/openQuran/Production/scripts/setup_production.sh
REPO_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || realpath .)
PROD_DIR="/c/Users/reh
